title: Europe Didn’t Want War With Iran. But So Far, It Can’t Stay Out of It.
summary_full: From London to Rome and beyond, leaders are facing diplomatic headwinds and criticism at home as they take part in a conflict they did not seek.
summary_public: From London to Rome and beyond, leaders are facing diplomatic headwinds and criticism at home as they take part in a conflict they did not seek.
